mpeg_o.exporters.nmrml
======================

.. py:module:: mpeg_o.exporters.nmrml

.. autoapi-nested-parse::

   nmrML writer — Milestone 29.

   Serializes an :class:`mpeg_o.NMRSpectrum` (and optionally its FID) to
   an nmrML XML document. Output mirrors the elements parsed by
   ``mpeg_o.importers.nmrml`` so it round-trips through the reader.

   SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0

   Cross-language equivalents
   --------------------------
   Objective-C: ``MPGONmrMLWriter`` · Java:
   ``com.dtwthalion.mpgo.exporters.NmrMLWriter``

   API status: Stable.



Functions
---------

.. autoapisummary::

   mpeg_o.exporters.nmrml.spectrum_to_bytes
   mpeg_o.exporters.nmrml.write_spectrum


Module Contents
---------------

.. py:function:: spectrum_to_bytes(spectrum: mpeg_o.nmr_spectrum.NMRSpectrum, *, fid: FreeInductionDecay | None = None, sweep_width_ppm: float = 0.0) -> bytes

   Build an nmrML byte blob from ``spectrum`` + optional ``fid``.


.. py:function:: write_spectrum(spectrum: mpeg_o.nmr_spectrum.NMRSpectrum, path: str | pathlib.Path, *, fid: FreeInductionDecay | None = None, sweep_width_ppm: float = 0.0) -> pathlib.Path
